message:
fix(embedding): prevent run-loop spin when only delayed retries are pending

The IndexRefreshWorker run_cycle loop used has_work() which returned true
even when the only pending items were future-dated retries, causing tight
CPU spin calling process_batch_limit on nothing runnable.

Both embedding queue implementations (search-core and db):
- Add has_ready_work() method that checks whether any item is actually
  runnable now (main queue non-empty OR retry queue has items with
  next_attempt_at <= Instant::now()), distinct from has_work() which
  just checks total count
- Add has_ready_work() to EmbeddingJobRunner delegating to queue
- Change run_cycle guard from has_work() to has_ready_work()
- Reorder backpressure check to after dedup check in enqueue(), so
  re-enqueues of already-queued items (dedup replacements) are not
  incorrectly dropped by the backpressure gate
- New test queue_backpressure_allows_dedup_replacement
- Reformat recompute_next_retry_due chain to multi-line

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
